capability_results.residual: MarkItDown 0.1.6 from microsoft/markitdown runs in the Python 3.13 sandbox as opt-in review-only; binary Office/PDF/image/audio coverage and strict default gates are still required before default adoption.
Upstream graph/MCP/export/search/talk surfaces are intentionally not executed or exposed; only native typed GraphSuggestion posture is allowed.

Headroom remains benchmark-only: registry source install from chopratejas/headroom currently needs Cargo >=1.85 for Rust edition2024 and no supported headroom.compress API is available in the sandbox.

warnings: Default adoption remains blocked for every capability.
MarkItDown is now package-identity checked and executable as an opt-in sandbox canary only.
The aggregate all-capability canary must fail while any requested capability has result-level failures or opt-in canary disallowance.
Headroom upstream source remains blocked until Cargo >=1.85 can build the registry source and a supported compression API or CLI contract is proven.
Live canary evidence is sandbox-only and does not replace owner approval, feature flags, full corpus coverage, rollback proof, tenant-safe production receipts, or API/MCP scoped canary credentials.
